Home How It Works

How It Works

YOUR JOURNEY WITH US

HOW IT WORKS

From your very first question to the day your team walks into their new locker room, we take care of everything. No surprises, no guesswork. Here's what to expect.

STEP 1

EXPLORE & DISCOVER

Browse Products | View Gallery | Explore by Sport

Take your time exploring our products, gallery, and sport specific solutions. See what other programs have built with PlayerStall and start imagining what's possible for your team.

View Products See Our Gallery

STEP 2

FREE CONSULTATION

No Obligation | Response within 24 hours | 30+ Years Experience

Request a quote, use our Locker Room Planner, or simply give us a call. Share your space, your sport, your budget, and your timeline. There's no commitment and no pressure. Just a conversation with people who've been doing this for over 30 years.

Request a Quote Try the Room Planner

STEP 3

CUSTOM DESIGN & QUOTE

Custom Layout | Itemized Pricing | 2 to 3 Business Days

Our team creates a detailed layout and itemized quote tailored to your space and requirements. You'll see exactly what you're getting: dimensions, materials, colors, branding options, and pricing. All before making any decisions.

STEP 4

DESIGN APPROVAL & DEPOSIT

Unlimited Revisions | Clear Invoice | 50% Deposit to Start

We'll work with you to adjust anything. Sizes, colors, configurations, accessories. Whatever it takes until the design is exactly right. Once you approve, a 50% deposit locks in your project and we begin production.

STEP 5

PRODUCTION

Quick Ship: 2 to 4 Weeks | Custom: 8 to 12 Weeks | Progress Updates

Your lockers are built by people who have been doing this for decades. Every piece is made from premium cabinetry grade plywood and finished exactly the way you want it. We'll keep you posted as we go.

STEP 6

SHIPPING & DELIVERY

USA & Canada | Carefully Packaged | Prep Checklist Included

We ship across the United States and Canada. Your lockers are carefully packaged and we coordinate delivery so everything arrives safe and on time. We also send you a checklist to get your space ready before delivery.

View Installation Guide

STEP 7

INSTALLATION & ONGOING SUPPORT

Easy Install | Phone Support | 5 Year Warranty | Replacement Parts

Our lockers are built to be easy to install, and we're just a phone call away if you need a hand. Once your locker room is set up, you're backed by our 5 year warranty. If anything gets damaged, our modular design lets you replace just that one part instead of the whole locker.

Installation Guide Warranty & Care

THE PLAYERSTALL DIFFERENCE

OUR PROMISE TO YOU

30+

Years of Experience

Family owned since 1996. We've built thousands of locker rooms for teams all over the US and Canada.

5yr

Warranty on Every Locker

We stand behind our work. Modular design means you can replace individual parts, not the whole locker.

1

Dedicated Contact

One person handles your project from start to finish. You always know who to call.

$0

Free Consultation

No cost, no obligation. We'll design your space and put together a quote before you commit to anything.

COMMON QUESTIONS

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

How long does the entire process take? +

Quick Ship orders go out within 2 to 4 weeks. Custom orders are built in 8 to 12 weeks. Including consultation and design approval, most projects wrap up within 3 to 4 months from first contact.

Is the design consultation really free? +

Yes, totally free with no obligation. We talk through your space, your needs, your sport, and your budget to put together a layout and quote. There's no cost until you approve the design and place a deposit.

What happens after I submit a quote request? +

Someone on our team reviews your project within 24 hours and reaches out to set up a call. We then put together a custom design with itemized pricing within 2 to 3 business days.

Do I need to install the lockers myself? +

Our lockers are built to be easy to install. We include detailed guides, and our team is on the phone with you whenever you need us. Most facilities managers handle installation themselves, but we can also point you toward professional installers in your area.

Can I make changes to the design after I approve it? +

Before production starts, you can make as many revisions as you want at no extra cost. Once production is underway, small adjustments might still be possible. Just give your contact a call and we'll do what we can.

What does the 5 year warranty cover? +

Our warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship for 5 years from delivery. Because of our modular design, you can replace just the damaged part without replacing the whole locker. Check our Warranty & Care page for the full details.

free
